description: Style Note fastrack gives you a new point of veiw with their new range of sleek and glistening shades. Life through glasses has never looked more impressive. These fastrack sunglasses give you that trendy urban look effortlessly! Accessorize with these and drive around town looking your fashionable best.Product Details Lens colour: BlackFrame colour: Black  frameFrame type: Full frameHigh bridge and flexible nose pads made of rubberMaterial and Care Remove dust and grime by gently wiping the lens with the cloth providedRemove oil or tough stains with the help of a lens cleanerDo not use your fingers on such stainsDo not place glasses on uneven surfaces or heated areas like the dashboard of a car Warranty: 1 Year
